subcodes.first_line: O beloved ones of God! Ye are the lamps of darkness, created for these days wherein gloom hath encompassed them that dwell upon earth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا احباء الله انتم مصابیح الدجی قد خلقتم لهذه الایام التی فیها اخذت الظلمه من فی الارض
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @justice and wrath of God, @praise and encouragement, @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
